sys_ui_page.html:
Project Planning
List of Activities
0 var gr = new GlideRecord('x_adga_project_p_0_activities'); gr.addQuery('scope_ref', "${sysparm_scope_id}"); gr.orderBy('number'); gr.query(); gr; ${jvar_count + 1}
Activities list with type, strata, scope and planned dates
S No Sys ID Activity Name Type Strata Unit Scope Planned Start Date Planned End Date Activity Applicable Primavera Activity No
${jvar_count} ${gr.activity_name.activity_description} ${gr.activity_name.type} ${gr.activity_name.strata} ${gr.activity_name.unit}
sys_ui_page.name: fill_scope_activities
